subcodes.first_line: God willing, mayest thou partake of that spiritual wine which is the recognition of the Beauty of the All-Merciful, and give others to drink of this divine nectar [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله از باده روحانی که معرفت جمال رحمانیست بنوشی و بنوشانی این رحیق
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @role and station of women, @knowledge; recognition of God
